---
title: "Teaching notes"
format: html
---

In progress: [preparation](preparation.html).

Overall [learning objectives](objectives.html).

Teaching notes: see [overview](index.html).

Setup:

- Instructor: JupyterLab: TODO
- Students: TBD (GitHub/jupyter notebooks)


Setup and installation of JupyterLab in venv:

```sh
sudo dnf install python3 python3-pip python3-virtualenv
python3 -m venv ~/venvs/jupyterlab
source ~/venvs/jupyterlab/bin/activate
pip install --upgrade pip
pip install jupyterlab scikit-learn pandas numpy matplotlib
```

Start

```sh
source ~/venvs/jupyterlab/bin/activate
cd ~/repos/analytics-and-big-data/_site/exercises
jupyter lab
# http://localhost:8888
```

TODO :
- installing libraries (pandas, ...)
- exporting jupyter notebooks (assignments and solutions) in separate directory?

Note: must call `make exercises` after `quarto render`
